name: Quick Notes
description: A floating scratchpad for quick notes with auto-save and markdown preview

args.title: Quick Notes
args.css: #editor { font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace; } #preview { font-family: inherit; } #preview h1 { font-size: 1.5em; } #preview h2 { font-size: 1.25em; } #preview h3 { font-size: 1.1em; } #preview code { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; } #preview pre { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; } #preview ul, #preview ol { padding-left: 1.5em; } #preview blockquote { border-left: 3px solid #6366f1; padding-left: 12px; color: #94a3b8; }
args.html: Ready0 chars
